title: Die Geschichte vom kleinen Muck
writer: Wilhelm Hauff, Peter Podehl, Helmut Spieß
actors: Thomas Schmidt, Johannes Maus, Friedrich Richter
plot: An old man living in an oriental city tells the story of his life to a group of kids: He too was once a young boy by the name of Little Muck - much like them, but with better manners and a heap of problems. Having lost his father ...
